title-group.article-title: Correction to: Coding Genes Helped the Origination and Diversification of Intragenic MicroRNAs

permissions.copyright-statement: © The Author(s) 2025. Published by Oxford University Press on behalf of Society for Molecular Biology and Evolution.

license.license-p: This is an Open Access article distributed under the terms of the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial License (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/), which permits non-commercial re-use, distribution, and reproduction in any medium, provided the original work is properly cited. For commercial re-use, please contact reprints@oup.com for reprints and translation rights for reprints. All other permissions can be obtained through our RightsLink service via the Permissions link on the article page on our site—for further information please contact journals.permissions@oup.com.

body.p: This is an correction to: Chengzhang Liu, Xiaojun Zhang, Jianbo Yuan, Jianhai Xiang, Fuhua Li, Coding Genes Helped the Origination and Diversification of Intragenic MicroRNAs, Molecular Biology and Evolution, Volume 42, Issue 2, February 2025, msaf036, https://doi.org/10.1093/molbev/msaf036
In the originally published version of this paper the labels of human chromosomes in Figure 3 were inadvertently omitted. Figure 3 has now been corrected.
